body:
query RecipesSearch(
    $query: String!
    $storeId: Int
    $hasCategory: String
    $size: Int
    $from: Int
    $sortBy: RecipeSearchSortBy
    $sortOrder: RecipeSearchSortOrder
    $enableDynamicCategories: Boolean
  ) {
    recipeSearchDetails(
      query: $query
      storeId: $storeId
      hasCategory: $hasCategory
      size: $size
      from: $from
      sortBy: $sortBy
      sortOrder: $sortOrder
      enableDynamicCategories: $enableDynamicCategories
    ) {
      ...RecipeSearchResults

      ... on RecipeError {
        code
        message
      }
    }
  }

query RecipesSearch(
    $query: String!
    $storeId: Int
    $hasCategory: String
    $size: Int
    $from: Int
    $sortBy: RecipeSearchSortBy
    $sortOrder: RecipeSearchSortOrder
    $enableDynamicCategories: Boolean
  ) {
    recipeSearchDetails(
      query: $query
      storeId: $storeId
      hasCategory: $hasCategory
      size: $size
      from: $from
      sortBy: $sortBy
      sortOrder: $sortOrder
      enableDynamicCategories: $enableDynamicCategories
    ) {
      ...RecipeSearchResults

      ... on RecipeError {
        code
        message
      }
    }
  }
